MacularPigment.desc: an accumulation in the retina of two hydroxycarotenoids, lutein and zeaxanthin

Corticosteroid.desc: a type of treatment for AMD

LuteinSupplementation.desc: Lutein supplementation for treating age-related macular degeneration

ChoroidalNeovascularization.desc: A disease characterized by the growth of new blood vessels in the choroid layer of the eye

NeovascularAMD.desc: A subtype of AMD characterized by the growth of new blood vessels

GeographicAtrophy.desc: A type of Age-Related Macular Degeneration

Neovascularization.desc: A type of Age-Related Macular Degeneration

OcularTumor.desc: Tumors of the iris and ciliary body

GeneticEpidemiologyStudy.desc: A study that examines the genetic factors of a disease

AgeRelatedMaculopathy.desc: degeneration or atrophy of the macula

AtrophicAMD.desc: a subtype of Age-Related Macular Degeneration

ChoroidalNeovascularisation.desc: A subtype of AMD characterized by the growth of new blood vessels in the choroid

LaserInterferometry.desc: A method for measuring ocular fundus pulsation
